verse: In the beginning God created the heaven and the earth.
theme: Creation, covenant, Abraham, Isaac, Jacob, Joseph
notificationBody: Genesis 1:1 — In the beginning God created the heaven and the earth.

verse: The LORD shall fight for you, and ye shall hold your peace.
theme: Deliverance from Egypt, Passover, Red Sea, Sinai
notificationBody: Exodus 14:14 — The LORD shall fight for you, and ye shall hold your peace.

verse: Ye shall be holy: for I the LORD your God am holy.
notificationBody: Leviticus 19:2 — Ye shall be holy: for I the LORD your God am holy.

verse: The LORD bless thee, and keep thee.
notificationBody: Numbers 6:24 — The LORD bless thee, and keep thee.

verse: And thou shalt love the LORD thy God with all thine heart.
theme: Covenant renewal, law, obedience, love for God
notificationBody: Deuteronomy 6:5 — And thou shalt love the LORD thy God with all thine heart.

verse: Be strong and of a good courage; be not afraid.
notificationBody: Joshua 1:9 — Be strong and of a good courage; be not afraid.

verse: The LORD is with thee, thou mighty man of valour.
theme: Cycles of sin, deliverance, Deborah, Gideon, Samson
notificationBody: Judges 6:12 — The LORD is with thee, thou mighty man of valour.

verse: Whither thou goest, I will go; and where thou lodgest, I will lodge.
theme: Loyalty, redemption, Boaz, Naomi, David's line
notificationBody: Ruth 1:16 — Whither thou goest, I will go; and where thou lodgest, I will lodge.

verse: The LORD looketh on the heart.
theme: Samuel, Saul, David, kingship, God's choice
notificationBody: 1 Samuel 16:7 — The LORD looketh on the heart.

verse: As for God, his way is perfect.
theme: David's reign, covenant, mercy, failure and restoration
notificationBody: 2 Samuel 22:31 — As for God, his way is perfect.

verse: Let your heart therefore be perfect with the LORD our God.
notificationBody: 1 Kings 8:61 — Let your heart therefore be perfect with the LORD our God.

verse: Fear not: for they that be with us are more than they that be with them.
notificationBody: 2 Kings 6:16 — Fear not: for they that be with us are more than they that be with them.

verse: Seek the LORD and his strength, seek his face continually.
notificationBody: 1 Chronicles 16:11 — Seek the LORD and his strength, seek his face continually.

verse: If my people, which are called by my name, shall humble themselves.
theme: Temple, kings of Judah, repentance, restoration
notificationBody: 2 Chronicles 7:14 — If my people, which are called by my name, shall humble themselves.

verse: For Ezra had prepared his heart to seek the law of the LORD.
theme: Return from exile, temple rebuilding, Scripture
notificationBody: Ezra 7:10 — For Ezra had prepared his heart to seek the law of the LORD.

verse: The joy of the LORD is your strength.
notificationBody: Nehemiah 8:10 — The joy of the LORD is your strength.

verse: Who knoweth whether thou art come to the kingdom for such a time as this?
theme: Providence, courage, deliverance, Esther and Mordecai
notificationBody: Esther 4:14 — Who knoweth whether thou art come to the kingdom for such a time as this?

verse: For I know that my redeemer liveth.
notificationBody: Job 19:25 — For I know that my redeemer liveth.

verse: The LORD is my shepherd; I shall not want.
notificationBody: Psalm 23:1 — The LORD is my shepherd; I shall not want.

verse: Trust in the LORD with all thine heart.
notificationBody: Proverbs 3:5 — Trust in the LORD with all thine heart.

verse: To every thing there is a season.
theme: Meaning, time, vanity, fear of God
notificationBody: Ecclesiastes 3:1 — To every thing there is a season.

verse: His banner over me was love.
notificationTitle: Day 22 Memory Verse: Song of Solomon
notificationBody: Song of Solomon 2:4 — His banner over me was love.

verse: They that wait upon the LORD shall renew their strength.
notificationBody: Isaiah 40:31 — They that wait upon the LORD shall renew their strength.

verse: For I know the thoughts that I think toward you, saith the LORD.
notificationBody: Jeremiah 29:11 — For I know the thoughts that I think toward you, saith the LORD.

verse: It is of the LORD's mercies that we are not consumed.
notificationBody: Lamentations 3:22 — It is of the LORD's mercies that we are not consumed.

verse: A new heart also will I give you.
notificationBody: Ezekiel 36:26 — A new heart also will I give you.

verse: Our God whom we serve is able to deliver us.
theme: Faith in exile, dreams, kingdoms, deliverance
notificationBody: Daniel 3:17 — Our God whom we serve is able to deliver us.

verse: Then shall we know, if we follow on to know the LORD.
notificationBody: Hosea 6:3 — Then shall we know, if we follow on to know the LORD.

verse: I will pour out my spirit upon all flesh.
theme: Day of the LORD, Spirit, restoration
notificationBody: Joel 2:28 — I will pour out my spirit upon all flesh.

verse: Let judgment run down as waters, and righteousness as a mighty stream.
notificationBody: Amos 5:24 — Let judgment run down as waters, and righteousness as a mighty stream.

verse: Upon mount Zion shall be deliverance.
notificationBody: Obadiah 1:17 — Upon mount Zion shall be deliverance.

verse: Salvation is of the LORD.
notificationBody: Jonah 2:9 — Salvation is of the LORD.

verse: What doth the LORD require of thee, but to do justly.
notificationBody: Micah 6:8 — What doth the LORD require of thee, but to do justly.

verse: The LORD is good, a strong hold in the day of trouble.
notificationBody: Nahum 1:7 — The LORD is good, a strong hold in the day of trouble.

verse: The just shall live by his faith.
notificationBody: Habakkuk 2:4 — The just shall live by his faith.

verse: The LORD thy God in the midst of thee is mighty.
notificationBody: Zephaniah 3:17 — The LORD thy God in the midst of thee is mighty.

verse: The glory of this latter house shall be greater than of the former.
notificationBody: Haggai 2:9 — The glory of this latter house shall be greater than of the former.

verse: Not by might, nor by power, but by my spirit.
notificationBody: Zechariah 4:6 — Not by might, nor by power, but by my spirit.

verse: Bring ye all the tithes into the storehouse.
notificationBody: Malachi 3:10 — Bring ye all the tithes into the storehouse.

verse: Let your light so shine before men.
notificationBody: Matthew 5:16 — Let your light so shine before men.

verse: For even the Son of man came not to be ministered unto, but to minister.
notificationBody: Mark 10:45 — For even the Son of man came not to be ministered unto, but to minister.

verse: For with God nothing shall be impossible.
notificationBody: Luke 1:37 — For with God nothing shall be impossible.

verse: For God so loved the world, that he gave his only begotten Son.
theme: Jesus the Son of God, belief, life
notificationBody: John 3:16 — For God so loved the world, that he gave his only begotten Son.

verse: Ye shall receive power, after that the Holy Ghost is come upon you.
notificationBody: Acts 1:8 — Ye shall receive power, after that the Holy Ghost is come upon you.

verse: All things work together for good to them that love God.
notificationBody: Romans 8:28 — All things work together for good to them that love God.

verse: And now abideth faith, hope, charity, these three.
notificationBody: 1 Corinthians 13:13 — And now abideth faith, hope, charity, these three.

verse: If any man be in Christ, he is a new creature.
notificationBody: 2 Corinthians 5:17 — If any man be in Christ, he is a new creature.

verse: The fruit of the Spirit is love, joy, peace.
notificationBody: Galatians 5:22 — The fruit of the Spirit is love, joy, peace.

verse: Put on the whole armour of God.
notificationBody: Ephesians 6:11 — Put on the whole armour of God.

verse: I can do all things through Christ which strengtheneth me.
notificationBody: Philippians 4:13 — I can do all things through Christ which strengtheneth me.

verse: Set your affection on things above.
notificationBody: Colossians 3:2 — Set your affection on things above.

verse: Pray without ceasing.
notificationBody: 1 Thessalonians 5:17 — Pray without ceasing.

verse: The Lord is faithful, who shall stablish you.
notificationBody: 2 Thessalonians 3:3 — The Lord is faithful, who shall stablish you.

verse: Let no man despise thy youth.
notificationBody: 1 Timothy 4:12 — Let no man despise thy youth.

verse: God hath not given us the spirit of fear.
notificationBody: 2 Timothy 1:7 — God hath not given us the spirit of fear.

verse: For the grace of God that bringeth salvation hath appeared.
notificationBody: Titus 2:11 — For the grace of God that bringeth salvation hath appeared.

verse: The communication of thy faith may become effectual.
notificationBody: Philemon 1:6 — The communication of thy faith may become effectual.

verse: Now faith is the substance of things hoped for.
notificationBody: Hebrews 11:1 — Now faith is the substance of things hoped for.

verse: If any of you lack wisdom, let him ask of God.
notificationBody: James 1:5 — If any of you lack wisdom, let him ask of God.

verse: Casting all your care upon him; for he careth for you.
notificationBody: 1 Peter 5:7 — Casting all your care upon him; for he careth for you.

verse: Grow in grace, and in the knowledge of our Lord.
notificationBody: 2 Peter 3:18 — Grow in grace, and in the knowledge of our Lord.

verse: Beloved, let us love one another.
notificationBody: 1 John 4:7 — Beloved, let us love one another.

verse: This is love, that we walk after his commandments.
notificationBody: 2 John 1:6 — This is love, that we walk after his commandments.

verse: I wish above all things that thou mayest prosper.
notificationBody: 3 John 1:2 — I wish above all things that thou mayest prosper.

verse: Now unto him that is able to keep you from falling.
notificationBody: Jude 1:24 — Now unto him that is able to keep you from falling.
